reviews.comment:
No es lo mismo que era hace unos años atrás hace meses que está cerrado el shop y la semana pasada para a cargar combustible y hasta los baños estaban cerrados una lastima por qué era una de las paradas obligatorias camino a buenos aires

(Translated by Google)
It's not the same as it was a few years ago; the shop has been closed for months now, and last week I stopped to refuel and even the restrooms were closed. It's a shame because it used to be one of the must-stops on the way to Buenos Aires.

reviews.comment:
Por ahora solo funciona el despacho de combustible..
Están en reformas..

(Translated by Google)
For now, only the fuel station is open. They're under renovation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21VNFVuQjZkR3htTlZGR05VVnhSMFYyV2s1bU5IYxAB

reviews.comment:
Llegamos hoy a las 23 hs. Excelente atención del playero, un 10, atento y educado, se tomó el tiempo de orientarnos. Baños mb, espacio para descanso. No hay full, pero si agua caliente gratis..

(Translated by Google)
We arrived today at 11 PM. Excellent service from the attendant, a 10 out of 10, attentive and polite, he took the time to give us directions. Very nice restrooms, good space to relax. Not fully equipped, but they do have free hot water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xreVpuUjROVXhTTWw4M1RIYzBTREZSUjNWck5uYxAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar hermoso..! Tenía un serví compras  excelente y bién variado..
Los baños siempre impecable.
La parrilla libre era de primera.
Es una lástima que sacaron los concesionarios.. por el momento está cerrado el Servicompras..!
En la parte de carga de combustible sigue funcionando perfectamente.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place! It had an excellent and well-stocked convenience store. The restrooms were always spotless. The all-you-can-eat grill was top-notch. It's a shame they removed the car dealerships; the convenience store is currently closed. However, the fuel pumps are still operating perfectly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBdy16ek9REAE

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar nafta el. playero vino unos segundos y se fue. Nunca apareció de nuevo hacia mucho calor agarre y me fui a la Shell que laburan mejor. Una pena antes era buena la atención.

(Translated by Google)
I went to fill up my gas tank. The attendant came for a few seconds and left. He never came back. It was really hot, so I drove to the Shell station where they do a better job. It's a shame; the service used to be good.
